purpose: Answer whether the previous two-step full-activation-checkpoint CE2 anchor at 58.71 TFLOPs/GPU is stable, and compare it against a clean six-step no-activation-checkpoint allocator-expanded gate.

previous_two_step_anchor.read: This was too thin to claim stability. The six-step recheck below rejects it as a stable promoted baseline.

decision.answer_to_stability_question: The previous 58.71 TFLOPs/GPU full-AC CE2 anchor is not proven stable; the six-step recheck rejects promoting it as the best sustained candidate.
read: The one-step burst is real but not the right promoted metric. In the clean no-AC allocator-expanded run, step 2 reaches 88.45 TFLOPs/GPU, then the late band stabilizes around 64-66 TFLOPs/GPU.

The burst-to-late-step slowdown correlates with memory growth and dynamic MoE routing/owner-rank skew. The allocator-expanded no-AC run keeps memory below about 108 GiB and avoids allocation retries, while the full-AC recheck climbs to about 249 GiB and emits allocation-retry warnings.

For reporting, use late-step or multi-step averages rather than a single step-2 burst. The current best materialized six-step sustained number is 64.91 TFLOPs/GPU over steps 4-6, not the old 58.71 two-step full-AC number.

commands: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_noac_alloc_expand_noprofile6_ep8_s4096_gbs128_20260604 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=6 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_ENABLE_PROFILING=false CANARY_ENABLE_STRUCTURED_LOGGING=false CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD=false CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS=2 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_AITER_DX_RETURN_MODE=sync CANARY_MORI_AITER_BLOCK_NUM=64 CANARY_MORI_AITER_RDMA_BLOCK_NUM=32 CANARY_MORI_AITER_WARP_NUM_PER_BLOCK=8 CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PERSIST_JIT_CACHE=auto MASTER_PORT=29571 experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
